strategies.description: Rank assets within each of eight asset classes based on a standardized value signal, then go long the top quintile (cheapest) and short the bottom quintile (most expensive). For stocks/indices, the signal is book-to-market ratio; for other asset classes, it is the negative of a 5-year past return.
data_source: Futures Exchanges (LME, ICE, CME, CBOT, NYMEX, COMEX, NYBOT, TOCOM)
strategies.universe_selection_criteria: For individual stocks: Exclude ADRs, REITs, financials, closed-end funds, foreign shares; exclude stocks with share price < $1 at month start; must have book value from Compustat/Worldscope in previous 6 months; must have ≥12 months of past return history; liquidity filter: include only stocks cumulatively accounting for 90% of total regional market capitalization. For other asset classes: Minimum securities available at sample start (e.g., min 8 equity indices, min 7 currencies, min 5 bonds, min 10 commodities).

indicators.name: Book-to-Market Ratio
indicators.formula: Book value of equity divided by market value of equity. For individual stocks, book values are lagged 6 months to ensure availability. For country equity indices, the previous month's BE/ME ratio for the MSCI country index is used.

indicators.name: Negative 5-Year Spot Return
indicators.formula: Negative of the 5-year spot return. Calculated as the log of the average spot price from 5.5 to 4.5 years ago minus the log of the current spot price. Specifically: log(Avg_Spot_Price_{t-5.5y to t-4.5y}) - log(Spot_Price_t).

indicators.name: Negative 5-Year Real Exchange Rate Return
indicators.formula: Negative of the 5-year exchange rate return, adjusted for purchasing power parity (PPP). Calculated as: [log(Avg_Spot_{t-5.5y to t-4.5y}) - log(Spot_t)] - Δlog(CPI_foreign/USA)_{5y}. The CPI adjustment is the 5-year change in the log ratio of foreign to US CPI.

indicators.name: Negative 5-Year Bond Return Proxy
indicators.formula: Proxy for the negative 5-year return on government bonds, approximated by the 5-year change in the yields of 10-year government bonds. A positive change in yield corresponds to a negative past return.

indicators.name: Standardized Value Signal
indicators.formula: The raw value indicator (BE/ME for stocks/indices, negative 5-year return for others) is standardized cross-sectionally within each asset class each month. Assets are then ranked based on this standardized score.

logic_pipeline.description: Calculate asset-specific value signal based on asset class
logic_pipeline.expression: IF asset_class IN ('individual_stocks', 'country_equity_indices') THEN value_raw = book_to_market ELSE IF asset_class = 'commodities' THEN value_raw = negative_5y_spot_return ELSE IF asset_class = 'currencies' THEN value_raw = negative_5y_real_fx_return ELSE IF asset_class = 'bonds' THEN value_raw = negative_5y_bond_return_proxy

logic_pipeline.description: Standardize raw value signal cross-sectionally within each asset class
Sort assets into quintiles based on standardized value signal within each asset class
logic_pipeline.expression: value_quintile = assign_quantile(value_signal_standardized, n=5) where Q1=lowest_signal (most expensive), Q5=highest_signal (cheapest)

logic_pipeline.description: Generate final trade signal based on value quintile ranking
logic_pipeline.expression: IF value_quintile = 'Q5' THEN signal = 'long' ELSE IF value_quintile = 'Q1' THEN signal = 'short' ELSE signal = 'neutral'

execution_plan.description: Monthly rebalancing of cross-sectional value factor portfolios within each asset class

strategies.description: Rank assets within each of eight asset classes based on past 12-month return (skipping the most recent month), then go long the top quintile (winners) and short the bottom quintile (losers). The strategy uses a pure price momentum signal applied uniformly across all asset classes.
data_source: Futures Exchanges (LME, ICE, CME, CBOT, NYMEX, COMEX, NYBOT, TOCOM)
strategies.universe_selection_criteria: For individual stocks: Exclude ADRs, REITs, financials, closed-end funds, foreign shares; price ≥ $1 at month start; must have book value in previous 6 months; must have ≥12 months return history; liquidity filter: include only stocks cumulatively accounting for 90% of total regional market cap. For other asset classes: Minimum securities available at sample start (e.g., min 8 equity indices, min 7 currencies, min 5 bonds, min 10 commodities).

indicators.name: 12-Month Momentum (Skipping Most Recent Month)
indicators.formula: Cumulative raw return over the past 12 months, excluding the most recent month (month t-1). Calculated as the product of (1 + monthly returns) from month t-12 to month t-2, minus 1.

indicators.name: Cross-Sectional Rank by MOM2-12
indicators.formula: Within each asset class at time t, rank all assets based on their MOM2-12 signal. Assets are sorted into quintiles (5 groups) using breakpoints determined from the cross-sectional distribution of the signal within that asset class.
indicators.latex: Rank_{i,t} = \text{Percentile Rank of } MOM2-12_{i,t} \text{ within asset class at time t}

logic_pipeline.description: Calculate the 12-month momentum signal for each asset, skipping the most recent month
logic_pipeline.expression: MOM2-12 = cumulative return from month t-12 to month t-2 (inclusive)

logic_pipeline.description: Rank all assets within each asset class based on their MOM2-12 signal
logic_pipeline.expression: For each asset class at time t: assign rank = 1 to highest MOM2-12 value, rank = N to lowest MOM2-12 value

logic_pipeline.description: Sort assets within each asset class into quintiles based on MOM2-12 ranking
logic_pipeline.expression: Within each asset class: assign quintile labels (Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4, Q5) where Q1 = top 20% (highest MOM2-12), Q5 = bottom 20% (lowest MOM2-12)

logic_pipeline.description: Generate final trade signals based on momentum quintile assignment
logic_pipeline.expression: IF momentum_quintile = 'Q1' THEN 'long_signal' ELSE IF momentum_quintile = 'Q5' THEN 'short_signal' ELSE 'no_trade'

execution_plan.description: Monthly rebalancing of cross-sectional momentum strategy based on MOM2-12 ranking within each asset class

risk_management: Liquidity filter: For individual stocks, restrict universe to stocks cumulatively accounting for 90% of total market capitalization in each region
Price filter: Exclude stocks with share price < $1 at beginning of each month
Minimum history: Assets must have at least 12 months of past return history
Asset class constraints: Portfolio constructed separately within each of eight asset classes
No explicit stop-loss or position limits mentioned in paper
